plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了负面情绪和错误信息在政治传播中的作用，分析它们如何影响公众对政治议题的看法和态度。
plain_summary_en: This study examines the role of negativity and misinformation in political communication, analyzing how they influence public perceptions and attitudes toward political issues.
research_direction_zh: 研究聚焦于政治传播中的情感和信息质量，旨在理解负面内容和虚假信息如何塑造公众舆论和政治行为。
research_direction_en: The research focuses on emotion and information quality in political communication, aiming to understand how negative content and false information shape public opinion and political behavior.
